slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

build_units.name: Project Management
build_units.lld_notes: Grounded existing-code-first (BF5, cheapest-source-first): read neighbor project_management modules (project_store.py, session_resolver.py, exceptions.py) + baseline-map conventions + aPRD CONVENTION_BASELINE BEFORE writing. New code matches the captured conventions, NOT canon defaults — lang Python>=3.11 (ADR-0002); layout src/freelancer_app/project_management/*.py (one package per component); naming snake_case module file (project_label.py) matching existing project_store.py/session_resolver.py idiom; lint pyproject pythonpath=['src'], no ruff/black config (so no reformat applied). Additive label feature: ProjectLabeler.set_label persists the label field on the EXISTING project record via C1 by REUSING the existing CT2 update surface (CT2 label extension, A14) — no new contract; propagates StoreUnavailableError + ConstraintViolationError + NotFoundError unmodified from the C1 mock (matches the existing project_management propagate-not-catch idiom). New namespace file ONLY; no existing project_management baseline file reformatted/restyled/edited (BF1). Framework-agnostic plain Python at the contract layer; synchronous, no async/queue (INV6).

verification.static_trace_basis: No pytest runtime available in bench. Each obligation test traced against implementation by construction: CT2 label shape — set_label delegates {label:...} to mock_data_store.update_project, the persisted label field equals the submitted text; CT2 label failure store-unavailable — StoreUnavailableError propagated unmodified from the C1 mock (no catch); CT2 label failure constraint-violation — ConstraintViolationError propagated unmodified. All assertions hold by construction. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT.

checked.layout: src/freelancer_app/project_management/*.py — additive file in the existing component package, no new top-level layout
checked.lint: no ruff/black config present — baseline files left byte-unchanged, no reformat applied
checked.naming: snake_case module file (project_label.py) matching existing project_store.py/session_resolver.py idiom

commits.message: C3 Project Management: project label field (CT2 label extension) — additive, convention-conformant
